name: Crumb-Topped Green Beans & Mushrooms
recipeIngredient: 1 tbsp Butter or low cal margarine
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large nonstick skillet over medium heat, cook the green beans, mushrooms, and onion in water for 3-4 minutes, stirring until crisp-tender and moisture evaporates. Add salt and pepper.
2. Place vegetables in serving dish; keep warm. Melt margarine or butter in oil in the same skillet. Add bread crumbs and basil; cook and stir over medium-high heat until light brown.
TIPS: Quickly thaw vegetables by rinsing them with warm water in a colander.
Per serving: dietary exchanges: 2 vegetables, 1 fat
Calories per serving: 80 calories
